steps.t: Yevan, Olwen, and Wundod can be found in Tûr Morva. Mair has challenged you to defeat one of the youthful fighters of the Falcon-clan in combat.
Mair is by a large rock in the northern half of the village of Tûr Morva in Tâl Methedras. You have easily defeated a youthful fighter of the Falcon-c…
Sors, Eiviona, and Owein can be found somewhere in Tûr Morva. Mair has challenged you to defeat one of the more accomplished fighters of the Falcon-cl…
Mair is by a large rock in the northern half of the village of Tûr Morva in Tâl Methedras. You have defeated an experienced fighter of the Falcon-clan…
